---
title: "MSc Transport Planning and the Environment Portfolio"
---

# MSc Transport Planning and the Environment

This repository contains the executive summaries and analysis from the modules from the MSc.

##  Module Index

### Transport Data Science

[Cambridge 20-Minute City Accessibility Analysis](data-science/tds.html)

### Sustainable Spatial Planning and Analysis

[Bikeability Index of Lima](spatial-analysis/sspa.html)

### Shaping Future Transport Systems

[Shared Micromobility: Challenges and Opportunities](shaping/shaping.html)
